name: Divine Domain

compilation_state.summary: Successfully parsed from SRD reference data.

description: Choose one domain related to your deity, such as Knowledge, Life, Light, Nature, Tempest, Trickery, or War. Your domain grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level. It also grants you additional ways to use Channel Divinity when you gain that feature at 2nd level, and additional benefits at 6th, 8th, and 17th levels.
lore: The choice of domain is a reflection of the cleric's relationship with their deity, defining the specific power and focus of their divine magic.
